dropped_from_baseline.note: Endogenous by audit, but failed the per-type inclusion rule. Folded implicitly into reaction/complex nodes per design.

inclusion_rules.rna: sRNA-like: has an outgoing regulatory edge; drops mRNA / rRNA / tRNA by name
inclusion_rules.small_molecule: signaling metabolites only: (a) has an outgoing regulatory edge to a protein/gene OR (b) name matches a known signaling pattern (cAMP, ppGpp, c-di-GMP, AI-2, indole, ...)
inclusion_rules.reaction: at least one protein catalyzes it (incoming catalyzes/is_component_of edge)
inclusion_rules.complex: >= 2 distinct protein components and non-transient complex_type

edge_split_rule: Both endpoints must live in the same library (per user spec).
